title: fragaria vesca f. semperflorens
intro: Fragaria vesca f. semperflorens, also known as the ever-bearing strawberry or woodland strawberry, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a variant of the wild strawberry (Fragaria vesca). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca f. semperflorens include reducing inflammation and improving heart health, as well as its potential to act as an antibacterial agent. Fragaria vesca f. semperflorens is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
